rationale: Section 11.431 references 'the exempted amount' generically without hardcoding a dollar figure. Increasing the exemption under §11.13(b) automatically flows through to late-application refunds and deductions with no textual conflict.
quote: The collector shall deduct from the person's tax bill the amount of tax imposed on the exempted amount if the tax has not been paid.
_note: No conflict; §11.431 uses generic term 'exempted amount' and adapts to any exemption level set by §11.13(b).
